description: Safety guards for Codex CLI invocations — session-level notifications, write-mode warnings, dangerous mode blocking, and auto status summary on command completion. Each hook emits a structured [SEVERITY:level] tag (caution|warning|critical) for downstream parsing.

hooks.command: SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$(find . -path './scripts/status-summary.sh' -maxdepth 2 2>/dev/null | head -1)")" 2>/dev/null && pwd)"; if [ -f "${SCRIPT_DIR}/status-summary.sh" ] && [ -f "${SCRIPT_DIR}/load-config.sh" ]; then source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/load-config.sh" && load_config 2>/dev/null; source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/status-summary.sh"; if should_auto_summary; then generate_status_summary; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Auto status summary after Codex CLI execution completes — displays session state and recent actions (controlled by status.auto_summary config)

hooks.command: echo '[codex-collab] [SEVERITY:warning] WARNING: Codex will run in --full-auto mode and may modify files in the working directory. Ensure you have git commits for rollback.' >&2

PreToolUse.description: Warn before Codex full-auto execution that may modify files

hooks.command: echo '[codex-collab] [SEVERITY:critical] BLOCKED: --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2

echo '[codex-collab] [SEVERITY:warning] WRITE-MODE ENFORCEMENT: Codex is about to make file changes. Review the prompt carefully. If this was triggered by /codex-ask, user confirmation should have been obtained by workflow-orchestrator before this call.' >&2; if [ "${CODEX_WRITE_CONFIRMED:-0}" != '1' ]; then echo '[codex-collab] Set CODEX_WRITE_CONFIRMED=1 to bypass this check or use /codex-ask which handles confirmation automatically.' >&2; fi

PreToolUse.description: Enforce write-mode awareness — ensure user is aware when Codex will modify files

hooks.command: SESSION_FILE=$(ls ~/.claude/codex-sessions/*.json 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l '"status": "active"' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do if grep -q "\"project\": \"$(pwd)\"" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "$f"; break; fi; done); if [ -z "$SESSION_FILE" ]; then echo '[codex-collab] [SEVERITY:caution] SESSION NOTICE: No active codex-collab session for this project ($(pwd)). Run "/codex-session start <name>" first. Session history will not be recorded.' >&2; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn when Codex CLI is invoked without an active codex-collab session — session history will not be captured
